name: Lucky Star X FNAF
description:
🎥 Lucky Star x Five Nights at Freddy’s (Movie Version)

“Moe Mayhem at Freddy Fazbear’s”

Genre: Horror Comedy / Mystery Thriller

Rating: PG-13 (for creepy animatronics, pizza-related trauma, and Konata’s sarcasm)

---

🎬 Plot Summary:

Konata, Kagami, Tsukasa, and Miyuki are doing a "ghost tour vlog" challenge for their school club. They break into an old, condemned building outside of town — a dusty place with a worn-out sign that reads:

“Freddy Fazbear’s Pizza.”

They’re not alone.

Mike Schmidt, the quiet new night guard, is already there. He tells them it’s dangerous — but Konata talks him into letting them stay “just one night for footage.” Meanwhile, Vanessa (the cop) becomes suspicious of their presence.

As strange dreams begin, the girls realize the animatronics are possessed by the ghosts of dead children — and the mystery of their murders is far darker than any fan theory Konata ever joked about.
creator: LuckyTsukasa
